title: Java item Beds
description: The unique item texture for beds with a fresh new look.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3443643f3b216e1007bb225b3f0e4f3e1b3b501c.png)

**This pack gives unique Item texture model, instead of classic 3d model.**

It's like in Minecraft bedrock, where the item model of the beds is 2d, but this pack gives the bed model a new looking texture.

**(Note: in the update1/update2 versions, mods like ETF/Optifine are no longer needed!)**
